aggregate.point_global_sse_conclusion: True-DeltaT Q1-Q3 regress in aggregate SSE; Q4 supplies all net point-global improvement.
aggregate.sample_relative_conclusion: Sample-relative improvement is not concentrated in only a small top-improvement subset.

paired_inference.bootstrap_method: paired sample bootstrap with replacement; percentile 95% CI
paired_inference.permutation_method: paired sample-wise model-label swap (Rademacher sign flip); two-sided
